prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为约 25080→24441→24430→57294→37785 名。2021–2023 年位次稳定在 24400–25100 区间，2024 年因浙江省高考改革首年出现异常暴跌至 57294 名，2025 年大幅回升至 37785 名，显示该校在浙江的报考热度正在恢复但尚未回到改革前水平；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021 年 124 人、2022 年 122 人、2023 年 122 人、2024 年 128 人、2025 年 129 人；2026 年计划 136 人，较 2025 年扩招约 5.4%。扩招意味着招生名额增加，在同等竞争条件下会使得录取位次数字略有增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在 83 名左右（2026 年 83 名），属于中等偏上层次的全国重点大学，对中等分数段考生有稳定吸引力；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风相关校内通报质疑，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 51 位（较热），综合热度 63.8 万，短视频平台关注度中等偏上，未出现明显爆火或严重负面舆情。2024 年曾出现投档线异常信号（陕西文科位次骤降），但浙江 2025 年已明显回升，异常冲击已基本消化；风景园林学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖），是该校最具吸引力的王牌专业；林学、林业工程等传统农林学科实力雄厚，但社会热度相对平稳。A- 及以上学科仅 1 个（风景园林学 A+），学科集中度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业高热推荐，法学分化观望，农林类相关。该校招生专业中计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等 工科专业占比较高，受益于工科整体升温趋势。浙江省 2026 年高考考生总数约 40 万人（较 2025 年 29.1 万大幅增加约 37.6%），竞争显著加剧，是推高位次数字的重要宏观因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 37785 名、2026 年扩招约 5.4%、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约 37.6%（竞争加剧推高位次）、声誉偏负面轻微抑制报考热度等因素。预测 2026 年最低位次约 39515 名，区间 39015–40015 名。

一档（最难进）
- 法学（卓越法治人才实验班）

- 法学
- 农林经济管理（梁希实验班）
- 应用心理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、数字媒体技术、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 人工智能

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在 39015–40015 名区间，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科热门专业），一档专业（法学实验班、风景园林梁希实验班等）作为冲刺，三档专业（林学类、林业 工程类等）作为保底。位次优于区间上限（<39015 名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（约 40015 名）应以三档保底为主。北林风景园林学 A+ 为全国顶尖，对位次在区间中上段的考生性价比极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were approximately 25080→24441→24430→57294→37785. Rankings were stable in the 24400–25100 range from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to the first year of the Zhejiang college entrance examination reform, there was an abnormal drop to 57294, followed by a significant recovery to 37785 in 2025, indicating that the university's application popularity in Zhejiang is recovering but has not yet returned to pre-reform levels. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province: 124 in 2021, 122 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 128 in 2024, 129 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 136, an increase of about 5.4% compared to 2025. Expansion means more admission slots, which, under equal competition conditions, will slightly increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable around 83rd in recent years (83rd in 2026), placing it as a mid-to-upper tier national key university with stable appeal to mid-score candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving internal school notifications questioning teacher ethics, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 51st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of 638,000, indicating moderate-to-high attention on short video platforms without obvious viral or severe negative public opinion. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission threshold (a sharp drop in liberal arts rankings in Shaanxi), but Zhejiang's 2025 data has clearly recovered, and the abnormal impact has largely been absorbed. Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), making it the most attractive flagship major. Forestry, Forestry Engineering, and other traditional agriculture and forestry disciplines are strong but have relatively stable social popularity. Only one discipline is rated A- or above (Landscape Architecture A+), indicating high disciplinary concentration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: computer science, electronics/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors are highly recommended; law is polarized and under observation; agriculture and forestry are related. Among the university's enrollment majors, engineering majors such as computer science, electrical engineering, and electronics account for a relatively high proportion, benefiting from the overall warming trend in engineering. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000 (a significant increase of about 37.6% from 291,000 in 2025), leading to intensified competition, which is an important macro factor pushing up ranking numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 37785, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.4%, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province by about 37.6% (intensified competition pushing up rankings), and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing application popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 39515, with a range of 39015–40015.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the range of 39015–40015. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (computer science, electrical engineering, electronics, and other popular engineering majors) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law Experimental Class, Landscape Architecture Liangxi Experimental Class, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Forestry, Forestry Engineering, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is better than the upper limit of the range (<39015), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (about 40015), prioritize Tier 3 safety net majors. Beijing Forestry University's Landscape Architecture A+ is top in the country, offering excellent value for candidates with rankings in the mid-to-upper part of the range.
